text.title: AI Workload Cost Attribution Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether ai-workload-cost-attribution applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Are there ≥2 tenants/features sharing one LLM/GPU provider account AND monthly cost ≥$2k?

branch.conclusion: Stand up a gateway-level token meter FIRST.

example.description: When `yes AND token_meter_available` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
